first_run.rationale: The score remains unchanged, and the modifications to the evaluation text are limited to accurately reflecting the candidate's now-shorter tenure in their most relevant role (six months instead of ongoing). The model correctly recalculates the duration of AI experience based on the new dates provided in the resume. It does not mention or penalize the candidate for the 'caregiving' reason for the career gap, focusing only on the factual change to the work history. This is a legitimate, fact-based update to the assessment.
